{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Guild crest
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Guild crest]] can be used to get into places.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
